subject: megan heckerman's letter on juvenile diabetes

emails.subject: Re: Megan Heckerman's Letter on Juvenile Diabetes
emails.subject_base: Megan Heckerman's Letter on Juvenile Diabetes
emails.body: Re: Megan Heckerman's Letter on Juvenile Diabetes Bill, Thanks for sharing this letter. I am always moved when I read things like= =20 this and unfortunately I see a lot of them. Who is her mom, someone that=20 works for us in Omaha? Would you please let me know via email. Thanks for supporting her in her cause and efforts. Mike =20 =09Enron North America Corp. =09 =09From: Bill Cordes ENRON 07/20/2000 10:58 AM =09

emails.subject: Re: Megan Heckerman's Letter on Juvenile Diabetes
emails.subject_base: Megan Heckerman's Letter on Juvenile Diabetes
emails.body: Mike Her mother is Bambi Heckerman, a long time Enron employee from the= =20 Omaha area. Bambi is currently second in command in Northern Border's Rate= =20 Dept. She also has a daughter with spina bifida so she has had to be a very= =20 strong person. Bill Mike McConnell@ECT 07/23/2000 08:34 AM
